'''vathosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabby|tabby]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-th-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabby|tabby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vathosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væthesheth|væthesheth]] || [[word:vætheshej|vætheshej]] || [[word:vætheshesh|vætheshesh]] || [[word:vætheshe|vætheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vathothoshoth|vathothoshoth]] || [[word:vathothoshoj|vathothoshoj]] || [[word:vathothoshosh|vathothoshosh]] || [[word:vathothosho|vathothosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vathoshoth|vathoshoth]] || [[word:vathoshoj|vathoshoj]] || [[word:vathoshosh|vathoshosh]] || [[word:vathosho|vathosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vathofshofth|vathofshofth]] || [[word:vathofshofj|vathofshofj]] || [[word:vathofshofsh|vathofshofsh]] || [[word:vathofshof|vathofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vathoshotho|vathoshotho]] || [[word:vathoshojo|vathoshojo]] || [[word:vathoshosho|vathoshosho]] || [[word:vathoshoko|vathoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vathoshoth|vathoshoth]] || [[word:vathoshoj|vathoshoj]] || [[word:vathoshosh|vathoshosh]] || [[word:vathosho|vathosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vathoshothol|vathoshothol]] || [[word:vathoshojol|vathoshojol]] || [[word:vathoshoshol|vathoshoshol]] || [[word:vathoshokol|vathoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vathoshoothotho|vathoshoothotho]] || [[word:vathoshoojojo|vathoshoojojo]] || [[word:vathoshooshosho|vathoshooshosho]] || [[word:vathoshooko|vathoshooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vathoshothon|vathoshothon]] || [[word:vathoshojon|vathoshojon]] || [[word:vathoshoshon|vathoshoshon]] || [[word:vathoshokon|vathoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vathoshothooro|vathoshothooro]] || [[word:vathoshojooro|vathoshojooro]] || [[word:vathoshoshooro|vathoshoshooro]] || [[word:vathoshokooro|vathoshokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|5bad82d}}
